creator: clearscreen@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Richard Scheffenegger from comment #80)

Grabbed the netstat -s output from a recent crash file where the system had been up for an hour before it crashed again, also posting some additional info. 

We have a test bench set up and we are trying to reproduce this behavior on LAN. It seems in perfect network conditions a massively parallel iperf run across a bridged interface for 24 hours does not trigger this. Looking for ideas on how to simulate internet-like network conditions. Short of hooking the other end of our test bench up to an internet connection in another city I am out of ideas. Open to suggestions.
